dependencies.name: qtbase
dependencies.reason: The Experimental immutable settings/theme projection and panel window host directly use system Qt Core and GUI, while the launcher controller and passive launcher, task, and notification presentation adapters use Qt Core. Ubuntu 24.04 CI verifies Qt 6.4.2 as the oldest tested common-API component version; Gentoo 6.11.1 supplies current reference evidence.

dependencies.name: qtdeclarative
dependencies.reason: The Experimental panel, launcher, and notification modules directly use system QML, Qt Quick, and Quick Controls. Ubuntu 24.04 CI verifies Qt 6.4.2 as the oldest tested common-API component version; Gentoo 6.11.1-r1 supplies current reference evidence.

dependencies.name: nlohmann-json
dependencies.reason: The shell's strict complete-snapshot parser includes the system nlohmann JSON header and recompiles canonical typed state; it is not an installed runtime library.

dependencies.name: basu
dependencies.fallback: Ubuntu and compatible hosts may use the selected API-compatible libsystemd sd-bus provider; one build links exactly one provider.
dependencies.reason: The event-driven shell settings client directly uses Prismdrake's selected sd-bus provider for the Experimental complete-snapshot contract.

dependencies.name: dbus
dependencies.reason: The shell consumes settings over the user session message bus; isolated tests use dbus-run-session while project code links the selected sd-bus provider rather than libdbus.

dependencies.name: libxcb
dependencies.reason: The Experimental Qt panel host and event-driven task controller consume the internal standards-only X11 adapter, which links system libxcb for dedicated event connections, RandR topology, EWMH task observation, and checked dock and window-manager requests. The complete shell runtime closure remains unmeasured.

unresolved.reason: The typed theme, launcher, task, and notification adapters, asynchronous launcher controller, live settings-snapshot client, panel, launcher, and notification QML modules, panel window host, and EWMH task controller are implemented, but the complete shell executable, runtime wiring, and direct and transitive closure still require measurement.
AT-SPI behavior was observed in the spike, but production accessibility linkage and packaging must be measured before declaration.
